englishDefinitions: (transitive) to plan, organize, make a plan for something
persianTranslation: (متعدی) برنامه ریزی، سازماندهی، برنامه ریزی برای چیزی
examples:
July 18 2012, Scott Tobias, AV Club The Dark Knight Riseshttp://www.avclub.com/articles/the-dark-knight-rises-review-batman,82624/
Where the Joker preys on our fears of random, irrational acts of terror, Bane has an all-consuming, dictatorial agenda that’s more stable and permanent, a New World Order that’s been planned out with the precision of a military coup.
